Title: User Authentication Success
Test Data: Valid username and password.
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid username and password.
2. Click on login button.
Expected Result: User is authenticated successfully and redirected to the main page.

Title: User Authentication Failure
Test Data: Invalid username or password.
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid username or password.
2. Click on login button.
Expected Result: Authentication fails and error message is displayed.

Title: User Creation with Valid Data
Test Data: Valid user details including name, email, password, etc.
Test Steps:
1. Open the registration form.
2. Fill in all required fields with valid data.
3. Submit the form.
Expected Result: User is created successfully and redirected to the main page.

Title: User Creation with Invalid Data
Test Data: Missing or invalid fields in the registration form.
Test Steps:
1. Open the registration form.
2. Leave one or more required fields empty or fill them with invalid data.
3. Submit the form.
Expected Result: Error message is displayed indicating the need to correct the data.

Title: View User Profile with Valid Credentials
Test Data: Valid user credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Log in with valid credentials.
2. Navigate to the profile view section.
Expected Result: User profile is displayed with all details.

Title: View User Profile with Invalid Credentials
Test Data: Invalid user credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Log in with invalid credentials.
2. Navigate to the profile view section.
Expected Result: Access denied or error message is displayed.

Title: Modify User Data with Valid Data
Test Data: Valid data for modification.
Test Steps:
1. Log in with valid credentials.
2. Navigate to the data modification section.
3. Enter valid data for modification.
4. Submit the form.
Expected Result: Data is updated successfully and confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Modify User Data with Invalid Data
Test Data: Invalid data for modification.
Test Steps:
1. Log in with valid credentials.
2. Navigate to the data modification section.
3. Enter invalid data for modification.
4. Submit the form.
Expected Result: Error message is displayed indicating the need to correct the data.

Title: Check Consumption with Valid Credentials
Test Data: Valid user credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Log in with valid credentials.
2. Navigate to the consumption check section.
Expected Result: Consumption data is displayed.

Title: Check Consumption with Invalid Credentials
Test Data: Invalid user credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Log in with invalid credentials.
2. Navigate to the consumption check section.
Expected Result: Access denied or error message is displayed.

Title: Generate Report with Valid Data
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has at least one consumption.
Test Data: Valid user credentials and consumption data.
Test Steps:
1. Log in with valid credentials.
2. Navigate to the report generation section.
3. Select the required parameters.
4. Submit the form.
Expected Result: Report is generated successfully and displayed.

Title: Generate Report with Invalid Data
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has at least one consumption.
Test Data: Invalid user credentials or missing consumption data.
Test Steps:
1. Log in with valid credentials.
2. Navigate to the report generation section.
3. Select invalid parameters or leave required fields empty.
4. Submit the form.
Expected Result: Error message is displayed indicating the need to correct the data.

Title: Delete Report with Valid Data
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has at least one report.
Test Data: Valid user credentials and report ID.
Test Steps:
1. Log in with valid credentials.
2. Navigate to the report deletion section.
3. Select the report to delete.
4. Confirm the deletion.
Expected Result: Report is deleted successfully and confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Delete Report with Invalid Data
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has at least one report.
Test Data: Invalid user credentials or non-existent report ID.
Test Steps:
1. Log in with valid credentials.
2. Navigate to the report deletion section.
3. Select invalid report ID or non-existent report.
4. Confirm the deletion.
Expected Result: Error message is displayed indicating the need to correct the data.

Title: Data Flow Validation
Test Data: Valid user data and consumption data.
Test Steps:
1. Log in with valid credentials.
2. Ensure the data flow from Authentication System to Notify System, UserProfile, ReportHandler, and DataManager is working correctly.
3. Verify the data flow from DataManager to WebServer and Database.
4. Confirm the data flow from ReportHandler to WebServer.
Expected Result: All data flows are validated and no errors are encountered.

Title: Data Flow Validation with Invalid Data
Test Data: Invalid user data and consumption data.
Test Steps:
1. Log in with valid credentials.
2. Introduce invalid data into the system.
3. Monitor the data flow and verify that the system handles invalid data appropriately.
Expected Result: The system should handle invalid data gracefully and provide appropriate error messages.

Title: Multiple Iterations for Data Validation
Test Data: Invalid user data.
Test Steps:
1. Log in with valid credentials.
2. Provide invalid data during the data entry process.
3. Follow the prompts to re-enter the data.
4. Repeat the process until valid data is entered.
Expected Result: The system should prompt the user to re-enter data until valid data is provided, and then confirm the successful addition of the user.

Title: Circular Data Exchange
Test Data: Valid user data and consumption data.
Test Steps:
1. Log in with valid credentials.
2. Ensure the circular data exchange between WebServer and Database is functioning correctly.
Expected Result: The system should handle the circular data exchange without errors and maintain data integrity.

Title: User Must Have Consumption
Test Data: User with no consumption data.
Test Steps:
1. Log in with valid credentials.
2. Attempt to perform actions that require consumption data.
Expected Result: The system should display an error message indicating that the user must have at least one consumption to proceed.

Title: Authentication Required
Test Data: Any attempt to access protected sections.
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to access any protected section without logging in.
Expected Result: The system should display an error message or redirect to the login page.

Title: Data Manager Failure
Test Data: Simulate a failure in the Data Manager.
Test Steps:
1. Log in with valid credentials.
2. Introduce a simulated failure in the Data Manager.
3. Attempt to perform actions that rely on the Data Manager.
Expected Result: The system should handle the failure gracefully and provide appropriate error messages.

Title: Network Disconnection
Test Data: Simulate a network disconnection.
Test Steps:
1. Log in with valid credentials.
2. Simulate a network disconnection.
3. Attempt to perform actions that rely on network connectivity.
Expected Result: The system should handle the network disconnection gracefully and provide appropriate error messages.

Title: Database Failure
Test Data: Simulate a database failure.
Test Steps:
1. Log in with valid credentials.
2. Simulate a database failure.
3. Attempt to perform actions that rely on the database.
Expected Result: The system should handle the database failure gracefully and provide appropriate error messages.

Title: Authentication System Failure
Test Data: Simulate a failure in the Authentication System.
Test Steps:
1. Log in with valid credentials.
2. Simulate a failure in the Authentication System.
3. Attempt to perform actions that rely on the Authentication System.
Expected Result: The system should handle the failure gracefully and provide appropriate error messages.

Title: Notify System Failure
Test Data: Simulate a failure in the Notify System.
Test Steps:
1. Log in with valid credentials.
2. Simulate a failure in the Notify System.
3. Attempt to perform actions that rely on the Notify System.
Expected Result: The system should handle the failure gracefully and provide appropriate error messages.

Title: Web Server Failure
Test Data: Simulate a failure in the Web Server.
Test Steps:
1. Log in with valid credentials.
2. Simulate a failure in the Web Server.
3. Attempt to perform actions that rely on the Web Server.
Expected Result: The system should handle the failure gracefully and provide appropriate error messages.

Title: Data Manager Data Integrity
Test Data: Introduce invalid data into the Data Manager.
Test Steps:
1. Log in with valid credentials.
2. Introduce invalid data into the Data Manager.
3. Verify that the system detects and handles the invalid data appropriately.
Expected Result: The system should detect and handle the invalid data appropriately, ensuring data integrity.
